description:
The manual exec-path manipulation for Emacs.app (lines 344-356) is fragile.
Consider using exec-path-from-shell which handles this properly, or ensure
the Nix integration sets up the environment correctly before Emacs launches.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (lines ~344-356)
title: Replace PATH hack with exec-path-from-shell
